observed_failure: RuntimeError: Program Q guardrail bootstrap produced invalid standard errors

diagnosis.ret_full: exactly zero for learner, complete open-loop frontier and classical family on every seed and cell
diagnosis.quantity_ret_full: exactly zero for learner, complete open-loop frontier and classical family on every seed and cell
diagnosis.worst_product_fill: nondegenerate and remains in the studentized max-t family
diagnosis.cause: the evaluator already defined active endpoints as SE > 1e-15 but rejected all SE <= 0 before applying that branch

authorized_reduction_change_only.deterministic_rule: A zero-SE endpoint is accepted only when every bootstrap draw equals its full-sample point within 1e-12; its exact lower bound equals the point.
authorized_reduction_change_only.stochastic_rule: All nondegenerate guardrails retain the frozen two-way one-sided studentized max-t inference.
authorized_reduction_change_only.fail_closed_rule: Reject a zero-SE endpoint if any bootstrap draw differs from its point, if values are nonfinite, or if the family contains no stochastic endpoint.

claim_boundary: Exact zero contrasts establish only finite-design noninferiority at the frozen -0.02 margin. They do not establish informative variation or tail safety for ret_full or quantity_ret_full.
